personal_information.name: Tobechukwu Emelife
personal_information.summary: Electrical and Electronics Engineering undergraduate at the University of Lagos with a strong passion for software engineering and finance. Experienced in developing responsive websites, React applications, and integrating machine learning tools.

responsibilities: Developed interactive internal dashboards for IoT data visualization using React.
Bridged hardware and web layers by designing intuitive UI controls for IoT devices.
Refactored legacy frontend code to improve component reusability.
Engineered responsive AI apps using React/TypeScript, implementing SSR.
Orchestrated state management using custom React Hooks and Context API.
Established CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for automated linting and testing.
Architected high-performance marketing site, optimizing critical rendering paths for SEO.
Engineered seamless subscription checkout flows using Stripe.
Assisted the owner with WordPress website development and IT solutions.

projects.name: Chat App
projects.description: Built a responsive chat interface implementing optimistic UI updates. Integrated Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for context-aware analysis.

projects.name: Pantry & Flashcard App
projects.description: Constructed a real-time inventory system using Firestore listeners. Integrated Computer Vision APIs for automated item logging.

projects.name: Riascope Malaria Detection Device
projects.description: Optimized TensorFlow Lite models for edge deployment. Engineered a multi-threaded Flask video pipeline to stream low-latency microscope feeds.
